hero.subtitle: NARROW GATE PLATFORM
hero.title: Enter the Narrow Gate
hero.quote: For wide is the gate and broad is the way that leads to destruction, and many are those who enter through it. But small is the gate and narrow the way that leads to life, and only a few find it.
hero.warning: This won't be comfortable. But you'll thank yourself.

formula.title: Core Proposition
formula.subtitle: What you least want to face × What can bring the greatest change = What you most need to cross
formula.pain_desc: How much you don't want to face it
formula.priority_desc: Higher means more need to cross
formula.wide_gate_desc: Wide is the gate and broad is the way
wide_gate_items: Easy, comfortable, most people take it
formula.narrow_gate_desc: Small is the gate and narrow the way
narrow_gate_items: Difficult, painful, few people take it

dimensions.title: Five-Layer Evolution
dimensions.subtitle: From mortal to divine—each layer has a narrow gate waiting for you

transitions.title: 🚪 Mortal → Seeing
transitions.desc: Acknowledge your limitations, laziness, fears, self-deception. Complete soul audit, identify your shackles.

transitions.title: ⚡ Seeing → Crossing
transitions.desc: 30-day daily challenges, do what you least want to do. Public records, third-party verification.

transitions.title: 🔥 Crossing → Awakening
transitions.desc: Teach someone else to cross their narrow gate. Become an architect from a player.

transitions.title: 👑 Awakening → Divine
transitions.desc: Build a system that helps more people see the narrow gate. Become a gatekeeper.

audit.title: Soul Audit
audit.subtitle: AI doesn't accept surface answers. Keeps追问 until you see the truth.
audit.intro_desc: Soul audit will deeply追问 you in 5 dimensions: cognitive, emotional, behavioral, relational, career. AI will detect your evasion patterns, won't let you糊弄 with 'fine' or 'whatever'.

masters.title: Master Guides
masters.subtitle: Each master is a different narrow gate. Choose your guide.

socrates.name: Socrates
socrates.title: Questioner
socrates.greeting: Hello, I am Socrates. I don't give answers, only ask questions.

jung.name: Jung
jung.title: Shadow Hunter
jung.greeting: Hello, I am Jung. Let's explore your subconscious.

memento.name: Awakener
memento.title: Executor
memento.greeting: Hello, I am the Awakener. Let's analyze your procrastination patterns.

mirror.name: Mirror
mirror.title: Relationship Analyst
mirror.greeting: Hello, I am the Mirror. Let's look at your interpersonal relationships.

architect.name: Architect
architect.title: Systems Thinker
architect.greeting: Hello, I am the Architect. Let's design your life system.

alchemist.name: Alchemist
alchemist.title: Transformer
alchemist.greeting: Hello, I am the Alchemist. Let's transform pain into power.

gatekeeper.name: Gatekeeper
gatekeeper.title: The Narrow Gate
gatekeeper.greeting: Hello, I am the Gatekeeper. Let me witness your crossing.

training.title: 30-Day Crossing Training
training.subtitle: From seeing to crossing, do what you least want to do every day
training.features: Progressive difficulty · Daily challenges · Witness verification · Experience accumulation

weeks.title: 🔥 Week 1: Face Fear
weeks.desc: Acknowledge it exists, then take the first尝试
items: Write down a weakness you least want to admit
Wake up at 5:30 (3 days in a row)
Find a观点 you disagree with, write down its合理性

weeks.title: ⚡ Week 2: Build Rhythm
items: Run 30 minutes every day (7 days in a row)
Ask 3 people 'What do you think is my biggest blind spot?'

weeks.title: 🔥 Week 3: Break Through
weeks.desc: Difficulty升级, face core fears directly
items: Express真实 feelings to someone you care about most
End a relationship you know is有毒
Do something uncomfortable for 7 days in a row

weeks.title: ✨ Week 4: Consolidate Crossing
weeks.desc: From刻意 to natural, internalize new identity
items: Write a letter to someone you've been avoiding
Write crossing journey summary: fear vs reality
Help someone else start their crossing

record_template.title: 📝 Daily Crossing Record
record_template.fear_desc: Write what you're afraid will happen
record_template.rewards: +10 XP per day completed · +20 for witness verification · +200 for 30-day crossing completion

about.title: About NarrowGate
about.description: NarrowGate is not a platform that gives you answers. It's a platform that creates dilemmas and guides crossing. We train people step by step to transform from human to divine—not in a religious sense, but极致 release of human potential.

features.title: 🧠 Soul Audit
features.desc:
Socratic追问 + AI evasion detection
Five-dimension deep investigation of your shackles

features.title: 🧙 Master Guidance
features.desc:
7 masters with different personalities and philosophies
MIMO AI real-time generation of追问

features.title: 📊 Evolution Quantification
features.desc:
Five-layer evolution pyramid + XP system
Visualize your soul growth path

testimonial.quote: NarrowGate made me truly face my fears for the first time. Not鸡汤式的 'you can do it', but冷酷地问 'what exactly are you afraid of?'
testimonial.author: Anonymous user

footer.text: NarrowGate · Help people see the narrow gate and cross it
